Label: Section 3.1
Issue: does not specify the types of web-ready devices supported
Correction: The DigitalHome system shall support web-ready devices including but not limited to computers, smartphones, and tablets.

Label: Section 3.2.1
Issue: does not specify the number of user accounts that can be created
Correction: The system shall support the creation of up to 10 user accounts.

Label: Section 3.2.2
Issue: does not specify the number of technician accounts that can be created
Correction: The system shall support the creation of up to 5 technician accounts.

Label: Section 3.3
Issue: does not specify the development process to be used
Correction: The development team shall use the Agile development process specified by DigitalHomeOwner Inc.

Label: Section 3.4
Issue: does not specify the operating system requirements for the DH Home Web Server
Correction: The DH Home Web Server shall support operating systems including Windows, macOS, and Linux.

Label: Section 4.1
Issue: does not specify the types of small appliances that can be controlled
Correction: The system shall support the control of small appliances such as coffee makers, lamps, and fans.

Label: Section 4.2
Issue: does not specify the communication protocol used by the thermostats
Correction: The thermostats shall use the Zigbee communication protocol to communicate with the master control unit.

Label: Section 4.3
Issue: does not specify the communication protocol used by the humidistats
Correction: The humidistats shall use the Zigbee communication protocol to communicate with the master control unit.

Label: Section 4.4
Issue: does not specify the communication protocol used by the security system
Correction: The security system shall use the Zigbee communication protocol to communicate with the master control unit.

Label: Section 4.5
Issue: does not specify the communication protocol used by the Appliance Manager
Correction: The Appliance Manager shall use the Zigbee communication protocol to communicate with the master control unit.

Label: Section 4.6
Issue: does not specify the format of the monthly planner
Correction: The monthly planner shall be in a calendar format, allowing users to select days and time periods for setting parameters.

Label: Section 5.1
Issue: does not specify total supported number of concurrent users
Correction: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: Section 5.2
Issue: does not specify the recovery time after a system failure
Correction: The system shall recover and restore data within 5 minutes after a failure.

Label: Section 5.3
Issue: does not specify the safety measures for power switches
Correction: The system shall include safety measures to prevent power switches from being turned on when young children are present.

Label: Section 5.4
Issue: does not specify the encryption algorithm to be used
Correction: The system shall use AES-256 encryption for securing user data.

Label: Section 5.5
Issue: does not specify the frequency of maintenance updates
Correction: The system shall receive maintenance updates at least once every quarter.

Label: Section 5.6
Issue: does not specify the format for system documents
Correction: All system documents shall be in PDF format and follow the HomeOwner document format [3].

Label: Section 5.7
Issue: does not specify the update frequency for the FAQ section
Correction: The FAQ section shall be updated at least once every six months.
